items.title: Trainee driver crashes bus into River Seine
items.dek: The driver hit a parked car and veered off the road into the river - about 12 miles south of Paris - early on Thursday.
items.body: The driver hit a parked car and veered off the road into the river - about 12 miles south of Paris - early on Thursday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Associate professor arrested for allegedly running meth lab in Michigan State University’s Wells Hall
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
items.dek: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.
items.body: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.
items.author: IriLine Desk
